response.original_title: 部屋とYシャツとメガネ巨乳 6
response.overview: Ayumi Shinoda is an exclusive reader model for a popular mail-order catalog, famous for her natural I-cup physique and her real-life status as a housewife. She is highly supported by her peers as a relatable and likable icon—whatever she wears becomes an instant bestseller. In this special feature, she explores a private 'Room, Dress Shirt, and Glasses' theme. This production captures her charm in a series of intimate domestic scenarios, focusing on her classic beauty and the 'megane' (glasses) aesthetic that has made her a favorite among fans
response.tagline: The hit-maker housewife—an intimate look at the catalog model everyone adores.
response.title: Natural Busty Catalog Model Ayumi Shinoda - Room, Dress Shirt, & Glasses 6
